subject: WM-0152 blocked
body: WM-0152 remains blocked after WM-0159. The legal public advance adapter is integrated and direct local repro reaches authoritative accepted -> moving -> working states for lamp/build, but the required web-shell E2E still times out at 120000ms under the live advance loop. The remaining missing public contract is a reliable authoritative terminal/drain surface for playable command progression: Web/E2E currently must poll projection/debug state while issuing advance requests, and there is no public awaitable UiDelta/terminal/idle helper to stop pumping deterministically. Recommended: add a public sim-worker session helper or reliable message for playable command terminal/drain state. Report: coordination/reports/WM-0152.md
